news.t: XUDV Emerges as a Standout Dividend ETF in 2026
Franklin Templeton Expands ETF Lineup, Launching Two New Income Multiplier ETFs

holdings.infoBox: XUDV is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Best Buy Co. stock at 5.25%, United Parcel Service at 4.89%, The Kraft Heinz Company at 4.64%, HP Inc. at 4.59%, and Altria Group at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Dividend Booster Index ETF (XUDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap companies that employs  an optimizer aimed to deliver high dividend yield balanced against volatility. XUDV was launched on Jan 21, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: VettaFi New Frontier US Dividend Select Index

data.title: XUDV Emerges as a Standout Dividend ETF in 2026
data.text: The Franklin U.S. Dividend Booster Index ETF (XUDV) has emerged as one of the stronger-performing dividend ETFs in 2026, benefiting from a mix of income-focused positioning and selective exposure to A...

data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands ETF Lineup, Launching Two New Income Multiplier ETFs
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton Expands ETF Lineup, Launching Two New Income Multiplier ETFs.
